title: baccharis decurrens
intro: Baccharis decurrens, also known as Coyote brush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Baccharis decurrens include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to reduce blood pressure. Baccharis decurrens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be easily incorporated into one's health routine.
